All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

P

panTo(Point3D, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
Glides the orbited point to newTarget over durationMillis, keeping the current viewing angle.
panTo(Point3D, double, double) - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.OrbitCameraRig3D
Same as OrbitCameraRig3D.panTo(Point3D, double), and also eases the azimuth to azimuthDeg -- use this to land facing a consistent default angle on arrival, instead of keeping whatever angle the user left it at.
phase - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
pickSurface - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
 
placeFleetRandomly(Board, Random) - Static method in class com.example.battleship.model.FleetPlacer
Places one complete fleet (per ShipFactory.createFullFleetTypes()) onto board at random, non-overlapping, in-bounds positions.
PLACEMENT - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.controller.GamePhase
HU-1: the human player is placing their fleet.
placementController - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.MainGameController
null when this controller was created via the "resume a saved game" constructor -- there is no placement phase to run.
placementHudPane - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
placementInstructionLabel - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.GameScreenController
 
placeOnBoard() - Method in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
Positions and (for a vertical ship) rotates this whole node to sit at its anchor cell, facing the right way.
placeShip(Ship) - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Board
Places a ship on the board, after validating that it fits within the board and doesn't overlap any ship already placed.
PLATEAU_FRACTION - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
Fraction of the length (from the bow) over which the beam ramps up to full width.
player() - Static method in record class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D.Layout
The confirmed-good layout for the player's own board: letters past row 10 (south edge) in normal A..J order, numbers before column A (west edge) but counting down 10..1.
Player - Class in com.example.battleship.model.player
A participant in a game: a nickname and the Board holding their own fleet (the board the opponent shoots at).
Player(String, Board) - Constructor for class com.example.battleship.model.player.Player
 
PLAYER - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.view.assets.BoardLabels3D.Board
The player's own board.
PLAYER - Enum constant in enum class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D.Turn
The camera should be hovering over the player's own board.
PLAYER_AZIMUTH - Static variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
 
playerBoardCenter - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
 
playerBoardGroup - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
 
playerHoverMarker - Variable in class com.example.battleship.view.BattlefieldView3D
 
playerShipViews - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.CombatController
 
playMachineShot() - Method in class com.example.battleship.model.Game
Resolves exactly one shot fired by the machine at the human's board, choosing the target via its ShootingStrategy.
position - Variable in class com.example.battleship.model.board.Cell
 
position - Variable in exception com.example.battleship.model.exception.CellAlreadyShotException
 
position - Variable in record class com.example.battleship.model.Game.ShotOutcome
The field for the position record component.
position() - Method in record class com.example.battleship.model.Game.ShotOutcome
Returns the value of the position record component.
Position - Record Class in com.example.battleship.model.board
An immutable board coordinate, expressed as a zero-based row and column pair (0-9 for a 10x10 board).
Position(int, int) - Constructor for record class com.example.battleship.model.board.Position
Creates an instance of a Position record class.
previewColumn - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
previewMaterial() - Static method in class com.example.battleship.view.Config3D
Flat, pale cyan "ghost" look for a ship placement preview -- opaque on purpose, see Ship3D#markAsPreview.
previewRow - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
previewShip - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.ShipPlacementController
 
progress - Variable in class com.example.battleship.controller.KonamiCodeDetector
